svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: PenguEats CI and Railway deployment pipeline
svg.desc: A push to main triggers GitHub Actions, which checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs Django check and 7 unit tests. Only if all pass does Railway build, run release migrations and collectstatic, and start Gunicorn to serve the live site.
svg.text: Every push to main must pass all tests before Railway ships it.
RAILWAY · Procfile + Nixpacks (only runs on a green build)
